description: Simulates a cascading failure: RDBMS outage followed by MCP Host failure and Cache degradation

scenarios.name: MCP Host Cascade Failure
scenarios.error_message: Upstream dependency RDBMS_PRIMARY unavailable - circuit open

scenarios.name: Cache Cluster Degradation
scenarios.error_message: Eviction rate exceeded threshold - memory pressure from failed DB queries

scenarios.name: Async Queue Backlog
scenarios.error_message: Consumer lag exceeding 10000 messages - downstream DB writes failing
